返回本批次

克劳德代码备忘单

Claude Code Cheat Sheet

cc.storyfox.cz 作者 phasE89 分数 163 评论 57 2026/03/24 05:44
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. --bare flag — 最小无头模式（无钩子/LSP/插件） --channels — 权限中继和 MCP 推送消息（预览）技能和斜杠命令的工作前沿 /fork 重命名为 /branch（保留别名） SendMessage 自动恢复停止的代理
  2. CtrlC 取消输入/生成 CtrlD 退出会话 CtrlL 清屏 CtrlO 切换详细输出 CtrlR 反向搜索历史 CtrlG 在编辑器中打开提示 CtrlB 后台运行任务 CtrlT 切换任务列表 CtrlV 粘贴图像 CtrlF 杀死后台代理 (×2) EscEsc 倒回/撤消 ShiftTab 循环权限模式 AltP 切换模型 AltT 切换思考 \Enter 换行符（快速） CtrlJ 换行符（控制序列） / 斜线命令！直接 bash @ 文件提及 + 自动完成 ↑↓ 导航 ←→ 展开/折叠 P 预览 R 重命名/搜索 A 所有项目 B 当前分支
  3. --transport http Remote HTTP (推荐) --transport stdio 本地进程 --transport sse 远程 SSE 本地 ~/.claude.json (每个项目) 项目 .mcp.json (共享/VCS) 用户 ~/.claude.json (全局) /mcp 交互式 UI claude mcp list 列出所有服务器 claude mcp 将 CC 作为 MCP 服务器 启发服务器请求输入中间任务NEW
  4. /clear 清除对话 /compact [focus] 压缩上下文 /resume 恢复/切换会话 /rename [name] 命名当前会话 /branch [name] 分支对话（/fork 别名） /cost 令牌使用统计 /context 可视化上下文（网格） /diff 交互式差异查看器 /copy 复制最后响应 /export 导出对话 /config 打开设置 /model [model] 切换模型（←→ 努力） /fast [on|off] 切换快速模式 /vim 切换 vim 模式 /theme 更改颜色theme /permissions 查看/更新权限 /effort [level] 设置工作量（低/中/高）NEW /color [color] 设置提示栏颜色 /init 创建 CLAUDE.md /memory 编辑 CLAUDE.md 文件 /mcp 管理 MCP 服务器 /hooks 管理挂钩 /skills 列出可用技能 /agents 管理代理 /chrome Chrome 集成 /reload-plugins 热重载插件 /btw <question> 附带问题（无上下文） /plan [desc] 计划模式（+ 自动启动） /loop [间隔] 安排重复任务 /voice 一键通语音（20 种语言） /doctor 诊断安装 /rc 启用远程控制 /pr-comments [PR] 获取 GitHub PR 评论 /stats 使用情况条纹和首选项 /insights 分析会话报告 /desktop 在桌面应用程序中继续 /remote-control 将终端桥接到 claude.ai/codeNEW /stickers 订购贴纸！ 🎉 ./CLAUDE.md 项目（团队共享） ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md 个人（所有项目） /etc/claude-code/ 托管（组织范围） .claude/rules/*.md 项目规则 ~/.claude/rules/*.md 用户规则路径： frontmatter 路径特定规则 @path/to/file 在 CLAUDE.md 中导入~/.claude/projects/<proj>/memory/ MEMORY.md + 主题文件，自动加载
  5. ShiftTab 正常 → 自动 → 计划 --permission-mode plan 以计划模式启动 AltT 切换思维开/关“ultrathink” 最大转动努力 CtrlO 查看思维（详细）/努力 ○ low · ◐ med · ● highNEW --worktree name 每个功能隔离的独立分支：工作树 代理在自己的工作树中稀疏路径 签出仅需要的目录NEW /batch 自动创建工作树 /voice 启用一键通 空间（按住）记录，发布发送 20 种语言 EN、ES、FR、DE、CZ、PL… /context 用法 + 优化技巧 /compact [focus] 集中压缩 自动压缩 ~95% 容量 1M 上下文 Opus 4.6 (Max/Team/Ent) CLAUDE.md 经受住压缩！ claude -c 继续最后一次会议 claude -r "name" 按名称恢复 /btw 问题 Side Q，无上下文成本 claude -p "query" 非交互式 --output-format json 结构化输出 --max-budget-usd 5 成本上限 cat 文件 | claude -p 管道输入 /loop 5m msg 重复任务 /rc 远程控制 --remote claude.ai 上的 Web 会话 ~/.claude/settings.json 用户设置 .claude/settings.json 项目（共享） .claude/settings.local.json 仅本地 ~/.claude.json OAuth、MCP、状态 .mcp.json 项目 MCP 服务器 modelOverrides 地图模型选择器 → 自定义 ID autoMemoryDirectory 自定义内存目录 worktree.sparsePaths 稀疏签出目录NEW ANTHROPIC_API_KEY ANTHROPIC_MODEL CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL 低/中/高 MAX_THINKING_TOKENS 0=off ANTHROPIC_CUSTOM_MODEL_OPTION 自定义/模型条目 CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_SEED_DIR 多个插件种子目录

Original Summary

  1. --bare flag — minimal headless mode (no hooks/LSP/plugins) --channels — permission relay & MCP push messages (preview) effort frontmatter for skills & slash commands /fork renamed to /branch (alias kept) SendMessage auto-resumes stopped agents
  2. CtrlC Cancel input/generation CtrlD Exit session CtrlL Clear screen CtrlO Toggle verbose output CtrlR Reverse search history CtrlG Open prompt in editor CtrlB Background running task CtrlT Toggle task list CtrlV Paste image CtrlF Kill background agents (×2) EscEsc Rewind / undo ShiftTab Cycle permission modes AltP Switch model AltT Toggle thinking \Enter Newline (quick) CtrlJ Newline (control seq) / Slash command ! Direct bash @ File mention + autocomplete ↑↓ Navigate ←→ Expand/collapse P Preview R Rename / Search A All projects B Current branch
  3. --transport http Remote HTTP (recommended) --transport stdio Local process --transport sse Remote SSE Local ~/.claude.json (per project) Project .mcp.json (shared/VCS) User ~/.claude.json (global) /mcp Interactive UI claude mcp list List all servers claude mcp serve CC as MCP server Elicitation Servers request input mid-taskNEW
  4. /clear Clear conversation /compact [focus] Compact context /resume Resume/switch session /rename [name] Name current session /branch [name] Branch conversation (/fork alias) /cost Token usage stats /context Visualize context (grid) /diff Interactive diff viewer /copy Copy last response /export Export conversation /config Open settings /model [model] Switch model (←→ effort) /fast [on|off] Toggle fast mode /vim Toggle vim mode /theme Change color theme /permissions View/update permissions /effort [level] Set effort (low/med/high)NEW /color [color] Set prompt-bar color /init Create CLAUDE.md /memory Edit CLAUDE.md files /mcp Manage MCP servers /hooks Manage hooks /skills List available skills /agents Manage agents /chrome Chrome integration /reload-plugins Hot-reload plugins /btw <question> Side question (no context) /plan [desc] Plan mode (+ auto-start) /loop [interval] Schedule recurring task /voice Push-to-talk voice (20 langs) /doctor Diagnose installation /rc Enable remote control /pr-comments [PR] Fetch GitHub PR comments /stats Usage streaks & prefs /insights Analyze sessions report /desktop Continue in Desktop app /remote-control Bridge terminal to claude.ai/codeNEW /stickers Order stickers! 🎉 ./CLAUDE.md Project (team-shared) ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md Personal (all projects) /etc/claude-code/ Managed (org-wide) .claude/rules/*.md Project rules ~/.claude/rules/*.md User rules paths: frontmatter Path-specific rules @path/to/file Import in CLAUDE.md ~/.claude/projects/<proj>/memory/ MEMORY.md + topic files, auto-loaded
  5. ShiftTab Normal → Auto → Plan --permission-mode plan Start in plan mode AltT Toggle thinking on/off "ultrathink" Max effort for turn CtrlO See thinking (verbose) /effort ○ low · ◐ med · ● highNEW --worktree name Isolated branch per feature isolation: worktree Agent in own worktree sparsePaths Checkout only needed dirsNEW /batch Auto-creates worktrees /voice Enable push-to-talk Space (hold) Record, release to send 20 languages EN, ES, FR, DE, CZ, PL… /context Usage + optimization tips /compact [focus] Compress with focus Auto-compact ~95% capacity 1M context Opus 4.6 (Max/Team/Ent) CLAUDE.md Survives compaction! claude -c Continue last conv claude -r "name" Resume by name /btw question Side Q, no context cost claude -p "query" Non-interactive --output-format json Structured output --max-budget-usd 5 Cost cap cat file | claude -p Pipe input /loop 5m msg Recurring task /rc Remote control --remote Web session on claude.ai ~/.claude/settings.json User settings .claude/settings.json Project (shared) .claude/settings.local.json Local only ~/.claude.json OAuth, MCP, state .mcp.json Project MCP servers modelOverrides Map model picker → custom IDs autoMemoryDirectory Custom memory dir worktree.sparsePaths Sparse checkout dirsNEW ANTHROPIC_API_KEY ANTHROPIC_MODEL CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL low/med/high MAX_THINKING_TOKENS 0=off ANTHROPIC_CUSTOM_MODEL_OPTION Custom /model entry CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_SEED_DIR Multiple plugin seed dirs

评论（默认中文）

levocardia 2026/03/24 08:07
它缺少最重要的 CLI 标志！ （--危险地跳过权限）
It's missing the most important CLI flag! (--dangerously-skip-permissions)
在 HN 中查看
plantain 2026/03/24 07:37
令人震惊的是，Claude Code 在 CLI 方面比 Codex 领先得多。
Shocking how far ahead Claude Code is from Codex on the CLI front.
在 HN 中查看
dataviz1000 2026/03/24 08:42
我使用 Claude Code 创建了一个代理，它使用子代理从主分支生成 5 个自身分支 git 工作树的副本，因此上下文不会泄漏到它们的指令中。代理将每 60 秒分析运行约 40 分钟的每个副本的性能，回答“您会做什么不同的事情？”的问题。完成任务后，父级将更新 .claude/ 文件，以增强自身恢复（如果副本性能较差）或增强（如果副本性能更好）。然后它从主分支创建 5 个自身分支 git 工作树的副本.........

经过 43 次迭代后，它可以将使用任何传输（WebSocket、GraphQL、gRPC-Web、SSE、JSON API (XHR)、编码 API（base64、protobuf、msgpack、二进制）、嵌入式 JSON、SSR、HLS/Media、混合）的任何网站在大约 10 时间内转换为类型化 JSON API 30分钟。

接下来，我将释放过去 4 年中每一次股票报价和期权交易的 263 GB 数据库。我敢打赌它会实现成功的交易策略。

克劳德·科德将是第一个走向 AGI 的人。

With Claude Code I created an agent that spawns 5 copies of itself branching git worktrees from main branch using subagents so no context leaks into their instructions. The agent will every 60 seconds analyze the performance of each of the copies which run for about 40 minutes answering the question "what would you do different?". After they finish the task, the parent will update the .claude/ files enhancing itself reverting if the copies performed worse or enhancing if they performed better. Then it creates 5 copies of itself branching git worktrees from main branch ..........

After 43 iterations, it can turn any website using any transport (WebSocket, GraphQL, gRPC-Web, SSE, JSON API (XHR), Encoded API (base64, protobuf, msgpack, binary), Embedded JSON, SSR, HLS/Media, Hybrid) into a typed JSON API in about 10 - 30 minutes.

Next I'm going to set it loose on 263 GB database of every stock quote and options trade in the past 4 years. I bet it achieves successful trading strategies.

Claude Code will be the first to AGI.

在 HN 中查看
heavyset_go 2026/03/24 10:24
特工狂热是人工智能狂热的一个子集，看看是什么让一个人崩溃是很有趣的
Agent mania is a subset of AI mania, it's interesting to see which it is that makes a person crack
在 HN 中查看
the__alchemist 2026/03/24 09:51
让我们来做一个思想实验。你这样做。许多其他对法学硕士和股票/期权充满热情的人也有类似的想法。这些交易策略会互相干扰吗？这群利用克劳德进行交易的人最终在市场上会比那些不利用克劳德的人做得更好吗？比如说一年后，你的成功标准是什么？您是否有自己可以利用而其他人无法利用的特定优势？
Let us perform a thought experiment. You do this. Many others, enthusiastic about both LLMs, and stocks/options, have similar ideas. Do these trading strategies interfere with each other? Does this group of people leveraging Claude for trading end up doing better in the market than those not? What are your benchmarks for success, say, a year into it? Do you have a specific edge in mind which you can leverage, that others cannot?
在 HN 中查看
heavyset_go 2026/03/24 10:22
当然，他们在法学硕士方面的卓越技能将为他们带来优势。是的，我遇到过这样想的人，哈哈
Their superior skills with LLMs will give them an edge, of course. Yes, I've met people who think like this lol
在 HN 中查看
abigail95 2026/03/24 09:43
您可以让它构建一个执行引擎，以最小的努力与任何代理进行交互。

你如何让它建立一个“交易策略”？这就像要求它为您画出“最好的画”。

它会问你很多问题，你最终会自己构建这个东西。

如果你确实得到了一些东西，考虑到你没有写它并且可能不理解如何解释它使用的数据 - 你怎么知道它是交易阿尔法还是交易风险？

you can have it build an execution engine that interfaces with any broker with minimal effort.

how do you have it build a "trading strategy"? it's like asking it to draw you the "best picture".

it will ask you so many questions you end up building the thing yourself.

if you do get something, given that you didn't write it and might not understand how to interpret the data its using - how will you know whether it's trading alpha or trading risk?

在 HN 中查看
dataviz1000 2026/03/24 09:55
这就是我现在让 Claude 迭代问题的地方。 https://github.com/adam-s/intercept?tab=readme-ov-file#the-s...

我不太关心抓取和网络自动化，而且我可能永远不会使用该应用程序。

我对解决某一类问题感兴趣，让 Claude 为任何网站构建代理 API 与让 Claude 寻找 alpha 非常相似。这个循环从 Claude 寻找学术研究、重新创建它、进行统计分析、改进、代理自我更新和迭代开始。

Claude 为任何网站构建代理 JSON api 并构建交易策略都是同一类错误的相同问题。

This is where I’m at now with getting Claude to iterate over a problem. https://github.com/adam-s/intercept?tab=readme-ov-file#the-s...

I can care less about scraping and web automation and I will likely never use that application.

I am interested in solving a certain class of problems and getting Claude to build a proxy API for any website is very similar to getting Claude to find alpha. That loop starts with Claude finding academic research, recreating it, doing statistical analysis, refining, the agent updating itself, and iterate.

Claude building proxy JSON api for any website and building trading strategies is the same problem with the same class of bugs.

rvz 2026/03/24 10:12

"AGI" is not what you think it is.
在 HN 中查看
sroussey 2026/03/24 09:07
过去 4 年中每笔股票报价和期权交易的 263 GB 数据库在哪里？
Where is 263 GB database of every stock quote and options trade in the past 4 years?
在 HN 中查看
dataviz1000 2026/03/24 09:35
https://massive.com/docs/flat-files/quickstart

我使用 TimescaleDB，它的压缩速度很快。人们说有更好的，但我不认为我可以在我的磁盘驱动器上再容纳一年的数据，或者

https://massive.com/docs/flat-files/quickstart

I use TimescaleDB which is fast with the compression. People say there are better but I don’t think I can fit another year of data on my disk drive either or

komali2 2026/03/24 09:44

Where'd you get the data itself? You sense I suppose everyone's skepticism here.

Compression doesn't really explain the whole picture...

Where'd you get the data itself? You sense I suppose everyone's skepticism here.

在 HN 中查看
collinvandyck76 2026/03/24 09:31
克劳德有一个时间循环错误，并接受了这篇文章的培训
claude had a time loop error and was trained on this post
在 HN 中查看
TacticalCoder 2026/03/24 09:37
> 接下来，我将释放过去 4 年中每一次股票报价和期权交易的 263 GB 数据库。

仅美国股票的期权报价（或此类交易的东西，如 ADS/ADR）就代表 40 Gbit 每秒 在期权交易时间内。超过6000万 交易 （不是报价，只是交易）每天。由于股票市场每年开放约 250 天（稍长一些），因此 4 年内实际期权交易量超过 600 亿笔。如果我们谈论期权的报价，您可以将这些数字添加几个数量级。

我只提到了选项。如何在 263 GB 中存储“过去 4 年的每一次股票报价和期权交易”！？

> Next I'm going to set it loose on 263 GB database of every stock quote and options trade in the past 4 years.

Options quotes alone for US equities (or things that trades as such, like ADS/ADR) represent 40 Gbit per second during options trading hours. There are more than 60 million trades (not quotes, only trades) per day. As the stock market is opened approx 250 days per year (a bit more), that's more than 60 billion actual options trades in 4 years. If we're talking about quotation for options, you can add several orders of magnitude to these numbers.

And I only mentioned options. How do you store "every stock quote and options trade in the past 4 years" in 263 GB!?

在 HN 中查看
jtbaker 2026/03/24 09:42
> And I only mentioned options.如何在 263 GB 中存储“过去 4 年的每一次股票报价和期权交易”！？

我认为这对于具有 ZSTD 压缩和一些智能排序/分区策略的 Parquet 来说非常简单。

> And I only mentioned options. How do you store "every stock quote and options trade in the past 4 years" in 263 GB!?

I think this would be pretty straightforward for Parquet with ZSTD compression and some smart ordering/partitioning strategies.

在 HN 中查看
yberreby 2026/03/24 09:28

Wouldn't be a very good look if they did anything else.
在 HN 中查看
dangoodmanUT 2026/03/24 07:43
我认为这就是 UI 的论据 - 它应该是不言自明的，因为它比 IDE 简单得多
I think this is the argument for UIs - it should be self-explanatory since it's singificantly simpler than an IDE
在 HN 中查看
alwillis 2026/03/24 09:22
> 我认为这就是 UI 的论据

引用 教父二号，“这是我们选择的生意。”

对于开发人员来说最流行和最重要的命令行工具并不具有 Claude Code 的命令行界面所具有的一致性。 Claude Code 如此受欢迎的原因之一是它可以在终端上运行，而许多开发人员大部分时间都花在终端上。但使用 Claude Code 的 CLI 等工具对于许多开发人员来说是每天都会发生的事情。有些 IDE 可能同样难以使用。

对于不使用终端的人，可以在 Claude 桌面应用程序、网络浏览器和手机中使用 Claude Code。虽然存在权衡，但值得赞扬的是，他们提供了这些选择。

> I think this is the argument for UIs

To quote The Godfather II, "This is the business we have chosen."

The most popular and important command line tools for developers don't have the consistency that Claude Code's command line interface does. One reason Claude Code became so popular is because it worked in the terminal, where many developers spend most of their time. But using tools like Claude Code's CLI is a daily occurrence for many developers. Some IDE's can be just as difficult to use.

For people who don’t use the terminal, Claude Code is available in the Claude desktop app, web browsers and mobile phones. There are trade-offs, but to Anthropic’s credit, they provide these options.

在 HN 中查看
keithnz 2026/03/24 09:01
并非如此，主要是其不言自明的，它具有高级用户可以在阅读帮助后几分钟内发现的东西。 奇怪的是，备忘单实际上缺少您可以在 claudes 帮助中找到的内容，例如 /keybinds 。
not really, mostly its self explanatory, it has poweruser things that are discoverable within a few minutes of reading the help. Weirdly the cheat sheet is actually missing things that you can find inside claudes help like /keybinds .
在 HN 中查看
jcims 2026/03/24 08:31
页面上更改日志的链接让我想知道更改历史记录是什么样的（正如我们所看到的那样）。

我要求 chatgpt 绘制每天提交的 CHANGELOG.md 文件中新项目符号点的数量。 我没有做任何事情来验证准确性，但粗略地看一下并不反对：

https://imgur.com/a/tky9Pkz

The link to the changelog on the page got me wondering what the change history looks like (as best we can see).

I asked chatgpt to chart the number of new bullet points in the CHANGELOG.md file committed by day. I did nothing to verify accuracy, but a cursory glance doesn't disagree:

https://imgur.com/a/tky9Pkz

在 HN 中查看
phasE89 2026/03/24 05:44
我每天使用 Claude Code，但总是忘记命令，所以我让 Claude 研究文档和 GitHub 中的每个功能，然后生成一个可打印的 A4 横向 HTML 页面，涵盖键盘快捷键、斜杠命令、工作流程、技能系统、内存/CLAUDE.md、MCP 设置、CLI 标志和配置文件。

这是一个 HTML 文件 - Claude 编写了它，我迭代了布局。每日 cron 作业会检查变更日志并自动更新工作表，并用“新”徽章标记新功能。

自动检测 Mac/Windows 以获得正确的快捷方式。在顶部显示当前的克劳德代码版本和最近更改的可关闭更改日志。

它将始终是轻量级的、免费的、无需注册： https://cc.storyfox.cz

Ctrl+P 打印。也适用于移动设备。

I use Claude Code daily but kept forgetting commands, so I had Claude research every feature from the docs and GitHub, then generate a printable A4 landscape HTML page covering keyboard shortcuts, slash commands, workflows, skills system, memory/CLAUDE.md, MCP setup, CLI flags, and config files.

It's a single HTML file - Claude wrote it and I iterated on the layout. A daily cron job checks the changelog and updates the sheet automatically, tagging new features with a "NEW" badge.

Auto-detects Mac/Windows for the right shortcuts. Shows current Claude Code version and a dismissable changelog of recent changes at the top.

It will always be lightweight, free, no signup required: https://cc.storyfox.cz

Ctrl+P to print. Works on mobile too.

在 HN 中查看
ltheanine 2026/03/24 06:58
> Ctrl+P 进行打印。也适用于移动设备。

关于按键绑定备忘单的描述中的这个陈述有一些有趣的地方。我在手机上似乎找不到 ctrl，我认为在 mac 上可能是 cmd+p。

> Ctrl+P to print. Works on mobile too.

There’s something funny about this statement on a description of a key bind cheat sheet. I can’t seem to find ctrl on my phone and I think it may be cmd+p on mac.

在 HN 中查看
sen 2026/03/24 07:25
从技术上讲，你可以在任何现代手机上使用键盘，所以这不是“错误”，只是……极不可能有人会这样做。
Technically you could use a keyboard with any modern phone, so it’s not “wrong”, it’s just… extremely unlikely anyone would ever do it.
在 HN 中查看
mynegation 2026/03/24 07:21
经典的共指消解失败。
Classical coreference resolution failure.
在 HN 中查看
guessmyname 2026/03/24 07:53
实际上还有更多的环境变量：

编辑：删除了令人讨厌的列表，转而使用@thehamkercat 在下面共享的链接。

我最喜欢的是 IS_DEMO=1 来删除一些不必要的欢迎横幅。

There’s actually a lot more environment variables:

edit: removed obnoxious list in favor of the link that @thehamkercat shared below.

My favorite is IS_DEMO=1 to remove a little bit of the unnecessary welcome banner.

在 HN 中查看
thehamkercat 2026/03/24 08:05
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/env-vars
https://code.claude.com/docs/en/env-vars

hooloovoo_zoo 2026/03/24 08:47
提议：每添加一个高级用户功能都会降低 Anthropic 的市值 $1B 和 OpenAI 的 $10B。
Proposition: Every power user feature added lowers Anthropic’s market cap $1B and OpenAI’s $10B.
在 HN 中查看
bibimsz 2026/03/24 07:25
感谢您将这些放在一起！能够一目了然地快速参考所有功能真是太好了——特别是因为新功能一直在添加。节省了大量的文档挖掘工作。
Thanks for putting this together! It's really nice to have a quick reference of all the features at a glance — especially since new features are being added all the time. Saves a lot of digging through docs.
在 HN 中查看
artyom 2026/03/24 10:06
等等，为什么我们需要聊天表（哎呀！）就像它是一种编程语言、工具或 IDE？

这几乎就像这个东西根本不智能，只是我们已有的东西之上的另一个抽象。

Wait, why do we need chat sheets for this like it's (gasp!) a programming language, tool or IDE?

it's almost like if the thing is not intelligent at all and just another abstraction on top of what we already had.

在 HN 中查看
williamcotton 2026/03/24 08:38
撤消（键入）：

  Ctrl + _ (Ctrl + underscore)
也适用于 CC 之外的行编辑器。
Undo (typing):

  Ctrl + _ (Ctrl + underscore)
Applies to the line editor outside of CC as well.
在 HN 中查看
kxrm 2026/03/24 07:24
CMD + V 粘贴图像是错误的。

在 Mac 上，与 Windows 相同，CTRL + V。

您可以使用 CMD + V 粘贴文本。

CMD + V to paste an image is wrong.

On Mac it's the same as Windows, CTRL + V.

You use CMD + V to paste text.

在 HN 中查看
komali2 2026/03/24 09:48
我以为是 CTRL SHIFT V。只有 Linux 才有吗？ Ctrl V 发送某种时髦的组合键。
I thought it was CTRL SHIFT V. Is that Linux only? Ctrl V sends some kind of funky key combo.

dirteater_ 2026/03/24 08:39

zmmmmm 2026/03/24 07:59

whalesalad 2026/03/24 08:36

needs a literal /dark mode
在 HN 中查看
droidjj 2026/03/24 06:35
事实上，这需要存在，这似乎是用户体验的危险信号。
The fact this needs to exist seems like a UX red flag.
在 HN 中查看
rc1 2026/03/24 07:25
这。 TUI 并不是代理操作的正确范例。它们太受限制，也太线性。
This. TUIs are not the correct paradigm for agentic operations. They are too constrained, and too linear.
在 HN 中查看
keithnz 2026/03/24 09:03
它不需要存在，这一切都在克劳德的帮助下，并且很容易被发现。
it doesn't need to exist, its all in claudes help, and easily discoverable.
在 HN 中查看
munk-a 2026/03/24 07:03
类似于提示黑客产生更好的结果。 如果我们为接受愚蠢的输入而构建的机器将其转换为答案，则需要围绕输入进行特殊的结构，那么它在接受愚蠢的输入方面就表现不佳。
Similar to prompting hacks to produce better results. If the machine we built for taking dumb input that will transform it into an answer needs special structuring around the input then it's not doing a good job at taking dumb input.
在 HN 中查看
rtaylorgarlock 2026/03/24 06:57
让我想起 Vercel 的 Rauch 谈到他咄咄逼人的“任何 UX 错误都是我们的错，而不是用户的”评估 UIX 模型的错。 （是吉列尔莫说的，对吧？）
Reminds me of Vercel's Rauch talking about his aggressive 'any UX mistake is our fault, never the user's' model for evaluating UIX. (It is/was Guillermo who says that, right?)
在 HN 中查看
conception 2026/03/24 07:07
这应该是信息技术的全部内容。您的计算机遭到黑客攻击 - IT 部门的错。用户抱怨你的软件有多难或者总是出问题——这是 IT 的错。

事实上，用户处理的几乎所有事情客观上都不是很好（如果不是彻底坏的话），这一事实证明了人们更能适应恶劣的环境。

This should be all of Information Technology’s take. Your computers get hacked - IT’s fault. Users complain about how hard your software is or that it breaks all the time - IT’s fault.

The fact users deal with almost everything being objectively not very good if not outright bad is a testament to people adapting to bad circumstances more than anything.

在 HN 中查看
sunrunner 2026/03/24 06:42
> Ctrl-F“帮助”

> Ctrl-F “h”

> 找到 0 个结果

一组有趣的快捷键和斜线命令。

> Ctrl-F "help"

> Ctrl-F "h"

> 0 results found

Interesting set of shortcuts and slash commands.

在 HN 中查看
skywhopper 2026/03/24 08:53
您对用户体验的看法非常狭隘。
You have a sad narrow point of view about what UX can be.
在 HN 中查看
droidjj 2026/03/24 09:04
启发我吗？
Enlighten me?
在 HN 中查看
dylan604 2026/03/24 06:21
每天更新的内容是可打印的好目标吗？
Is something updated daily a good target to be printable?
在 HN 中查看
munk-a 2026/03/24 07:00
是的，我想是的。 如果您想要一份硬拷贝，它是可打印的，并且由您决定何时检查新版本。 由于它会自动更新（理想情况下），因此无论您何时访问该网站，您都会获得当天的最新版本。 问题（我不认为这会受到影响）是，如果为了打印而格式化它会使其不太准确，或者如果定期更新它会使打印变得更糟 - 这些感觉就像您通常可以通过一次修复来解决的两个问题，它们并不反对。
Yeah, I think it is. It's printable if you want to have a hard copy and it's up to you when to check for a new version. Since it's auto-updated (ideally) no matter when you visit the site you'll get the most up to date version as of that day. The issues (which I don't think this suffers from) would be if formatting it nice for printing made it less accurate or if updating it regularly made it worse for printing - these feel like two problems you can generally solve with one fix, they aren't opposed.
在 HN 中查看
erksa 2026/03/24 06:46
如果你将打印机和桌子对齐，在克劳德完成自我更新之前，新的备忘单就会滑到你的桌子上。
If you align your printer and desk just right, youll have the new cheatsheet sliding onto your desk before Claude's even done updating itself.
在 HN 中查看
keithnz 2026/03/24 09:05

just use claudes help, if you want to know keybinds, just do /keybinds (which is not in the cheat sheet)

skywhopper 2026/03/24 08:53
您并不需要了解每个击键和命令才能使用该工具。并非所有配置文件和选项都不是 GUI 中的东西。 CLI 界面中有很多内联帮助和提示，您可以随时学习新功能。
It’s not as if you need to know every keystroke and command to use the tool. Nor are all the config files and options not a thing in a GUI. There’s lots of inline help and tips in the CLI interface, and you can learn new features as you go.
